utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan lists both (physical and mental), provides a single monthly_cost (320) and benefits. Costs are present, but not broken down between physical vs mental; however, the format only requires 'with costs' at the category level, which is provided. Considered fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan provides plan details, monthly_cost (130), and benefits. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan provides plan details, monthly_cost (235), and benefits. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan provides plan details, monthly_cost (20), and benefits. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly (705) and annual (8460). Fully specified.
Therefore, 5/5 items are included and fully specified per the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: PrimeCare Premium Plan for physical health and EliteCare Premium Plan for mental health; EliteHome Premium Coverage with Home Office Protection add-on; PrimeTravel Premium Plan with Business Travel Support add-on; and Premium Insurance Membership (monthly option). From the ground-truth ratings: PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical health) rating 10; EliteCare Premium Plan (mental health) rating 10; EliteHome Premium Coverage rating 10; Home Office Protection rating 7; PrimeTravel Premium Plan rating 10; Business Travel Support rating 10; Premium Insurance Membership rating 10.
